description: AI Horde operator pulse — active alerts, headline workers/queue/throughput, historical stats, pop diagnostics, generation outcomes, and teams.

panels.description: Active firing/pending alerts at warning or critical severity. Hidden when no Alertmanager datasource is provisioned (Org 1 only).
panels.title: Active Alerts

panels.description: Active image workers. Below 1 is critical (HordeNoActiveImageWorkers); below 5 indicates degraded capacity.
panels.title: Image Workers

panels.description: Active text workers. Below 1 is warning (HordeNoActiveTextWorkers).
panels.title: Text Workers

panels.description: Estimated time to drain the image queue at current throughput. >30m matches HordeImageQueueBacklog.
panels.title: Image Queue Drain

panels.description: Estimated time to drain the text queue at current throughput.
panels.title: Text Queue Drain

panels.description: Worst-case scrape success across all upstream API endpoints.
panels.title: Scrape Health
Pop Diagnostics (why workers can't pick up jobs)

panels.description: Job-pop skip rate by reason. A dominant reason indicates worker pool/model mismatch.
panels.title: Skips per Second by Reason

panels.description: Top 10 skip reasons over the last hour.
panels.title: Top Skip Reasons (1h)

panels.description: How many candidate WPs the pop loop evaluated before returning. High p95 with low return ratio = saturation/mismatch.
panels.title: Pop Candidates Evaluated (p95/p50)

panels.description: Fraction of pop attempts that returned a job. Low values mean workers are connecting but not getting work.
panels.title: Pop Match Ratio

panels.description: Submit outcome rate by category. Sustained censored/faulted indicate abuse, worker quality, or model failures.
panels.title: Submit Outcome Rate (stacked)

panels.description: Faulted-to-total ratio. Threshold annotation tracks HordeSubmitFaultRate.
panels.title: Faulted Ratio (5m)

panels.description: Censored-to-total ratio. Sustained elevation cross-checks raid mode.
panels.title: Censored Ratio (5m)

title: Horde Performance (Internal)
